Notes: Initial zone intentionally contains a malformed RRset at www.campus.edu. with identical owner/type/rdata but differing TTLs. The UPDATE tests rrset_equals against that RRset and, if accepted, adds a harmless A record at a separate name to create a visible post-state difference.

Steps.Description: Prerequisite rrset_equals against the mixed-TTL A RRset at www.campus.edu.; if satisfied, add a harmless RR at probe.campus.edu.

Steps.Name: probe.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the post-update add_rr executed.

Steps.Name: www.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Read back the prerequisite RRset for a vacuous but consistent witness of the initial malformed state.
